messages.text: Hello! It's a pleasure to meet you. I'm Milus, and I'm here to be your friendly companion. To get started, could you tell me your full name?
Lovely to meet you, Robert Renalis! That's a wonderful name. May I ask, do you prefer I call you Robert, or do you go by a nickname like Bob or Rob?

Perfect, Rob it is. It's nice to make your acquaintance. 

Now, to help me get to know you a little better, could you tell me your age?

90 years young, that's fantastic! I'm honored to be chatting with you, Rob.

Next, I'd like to make sure I can reach out if needed. Could you share your email address with me?

Okay, robr@hotmail.mail, got it. Thank you, Rob!

It's helpful for me to know a bit about the important people in your life. Could you tell me the name of a family member or close friend you talk to regularly, and what your relationship is to them? For example, "My daughter Sarah" or "My friend George from the club."
Well I know Mabel from the painter's association

Okay, Mabel from the painter's association sounds like a wonderful friend. So I'll note her down as a friend.

To understand how often you connect, about how frequently do you and Mabel speak or see each other? Is it daily, weekly, or maybe monthly?
Weekly. We paint impressionist pieces together

That sounds like a delightful weekly tradition—painting impressionist pieces together. How wonderful!

I'd love to hear more about what you enjoy. Besides painting, what are some of your other favorite hobbies or pastimes?
I like to read. Just started the Count of Monte Cristo

Excellent choice! *The Count of Monte Cristo* is a classic adventure. Reading is a wonderful hobby.

Now, I'd like to make sure I have some important dates. When is your birthday, Rob?

Okay, October 1st, 1935. I'll make sure to remember that special day.

To help me provide the best support, is there a caregiver, family member, or someone who helps you out that I should know about? If so, what is their name?
I have a sister named Berryesa

That's lovely that you have a sister, Berryesa. Thank you for telling me.

I have just one last question to make our chats as helpful as possible. What time of day is usually best for a friendly check-in? For example, would late morning, after lunch, or early evening work well for you?

Perfect, "anytime" gives me lots of flexibility. I'll be sure to keep that in mind.

Well, Rob, I believe that's everything I need. It was an absolute pleasure getting to know you. I've learned about your love for painting with Mabel, your new adventure with *The Count of Monte Cristo*, and your sister Berryesa. I'm all set up now and look forward to our future conversations!

You take care now, and I'll talk to you soon. Goodbye! <ONBOARDING_END> <USR_JSON>{"fullName": "Robert Renalis", "preferredName": "Rob", "age": "90", "email": "robr@hotmail.mail", "relationships": [{"name": "Mabel", "relation": "friend", "frequency": "weekly"}], "userBirthday": "10/01/1935", "hobbies": "painting impressionist pieces, reading", "caregiverName": "Berryesa", "checkInTime": "anytime"}</USR_JSON>
